_doc: Medical-AI taxonomy for COMPUTEX/InnoVEX 2026. `gate` = strong terms that qualify a company as medical-relevant at all. `categories` = 10 sub-domains; each row's `kw` decides sub-category membership (matched only within the gated subset).

desc.zh: 放射、病理、內視鏡、超音波、眼底等醫學影像的 AI 判讀、標註與輔助診斷。
desc.en: AI reading, annotation and assisted diagnosis for radiology, pathology, endoscopy, ultrasound and retinal imaging.

desc.zh: 語音轉錄、語音病歷、智慧聽診、語音助理等聲學訊號的臨床應用。
desc.en: Speech transcription, voice EMR, smart auscultation and voice assistants for clinical settings.

desc.zh: 臨床文本理解、報告自動生成、醫療大語言模型與生成式 AI 應用。
desc.en: Clinical text understanding, automated report generation, medical LLMs and generative-AI applications.

desc.zh: 電子病歷系統、結構化資料、FHIR/HL7 互通與病歷資料平台。
desc.en: Electronic medical/health record systems, structured data, FHIR/HL7 interoperability and record data platforms.

desc.zh: 醫院資訊系統(HIS)、臨床決策支援、分診、流程與營運最佳化。
desc.en: Hospital information systems (HIS), clinical decision support, triage and workflow/operations optimization.

desc.zh: 智慧醫療器材、穿戴裝置、生理感測、IVD 與 point-of-care 檢測。
desc.en: Smart medical devices, wearables, physiological sensing, IVD and point-of-care testing.

desc.zh: AI 藥物發現、基因體、蛋白質結構、生物資訊與精準醫療。
desc.en: AI drug discovery, genomics, protein structure, bioinformatics and precision medicine.

desc.zh: 遠距醫療、健康監測、慢性病與長照管理、預防醫學與健康促進。
desc.en: Telemedicine, health monitoring, chronic-disease and elderly-care management, preventive health.

desc.zh: 手術導航與機器人、復健機器人、外骨骼、智慧義肢與輔具。
desc.en: Surgical navigation and robots, rehabilitation robots, exoskeletons, smart prosthetics and assistive devices.

name.zh: 醫療 AI 算力與隱私運算

desc.zh: 醫療 AI 的邊緣運算、推論加速、聯邦學習、隱私保護與資安基礎設施。
desc.en: Edge computing, inference acceleration, federated learning, privacy and security infrastructure for medical AI.
